//: SEO is deliberately NOT asserted here. Every Vercel preview deployment is served with x-robots-tag: noindex, which Lighthouse weights at ~30% of the SEO category, so every preview scores ~0.66 regardless of real SEO quality. Static SEO invariants (canonical, og, twitter, JSON-LD, sitemap, robots.txt, icons) are already enforced on every PR by scripts/audit-build.mjs (R2.2). SEO scores are still collected and surfaced in the PR comment for visibility.
